subject: (no subject)
body:
My intentions , are not to make you FEEL bad , my intentions are to point out that your actions, and behaviors are going to lead you and I to part. My inartful phrases ,eminate from a place of huge frustration. As you say, if you are the same person, I don't remember you telling me , who I should see, Who I should talk to, Who I should take a nap with. I don't remember you "getting sick " by reading a piece of paper with a name on it. I don't remember you complaining about who sat in" your" chair,  My views  of these things have never changed , never, Instead of dealing with the characterizations of your behavior. I think it would be helpful for you to deal with the facts. Did I say your body , never looked better and you should NOT get lipo.. yes.. did you agree to continue to excercise, yes,  did you stop yes,  did you agree to read a book every two weeks. then stop yes. did you spend more time on your school homework ,   then on learning to cook even
 one thing well ,yes Is your cooking bad, Yes, it is . ( you asked that I tell you as opposed to giving it under the table to the dog). Did you spend the time trying to get it right (, however  you stayed up all night to draw parallel lines) , NO.   Have people around you , uncomfortable with your  immature demands, ( chair food  ...) ,   have no other  way to deal with it except -to make fun of you. . Since you say " I used to say the opposite,, you'll have to remind me.. I don't recall saying you were generous ,as opposed to selfish, In fact I rememeber saying that as you are the host , you have addtional burdens of being gracious. you chose to ignore this advice. I have said you are stubborn. , as regard me "used to say the opposite". you mean I said you were generous, enegetic, not-jealous, forgiving, everybody wants to be around you, your massages are great, your cooking ( except for egglplant ) is superb. Muhla Banda has erased that memory   Re
 your opinions, I suggested , as I have done to everyone no matter what their station in life, that your opinions are worthless if not backed by evidence. they are mere opinions.  not based on evidence and a path that follows assumptions to conclusions. your opinion was -you weighed 120 the scale said 145, your opinion was that  Tatiana was at the house, that was more important than checking the facts. You write "I think" you are jealous. and my thinking or saying this make you feel bad about yourself. wouldn't it be more approriate to ask yourself , IS IT TRUE? , DO I COMPLAIN about other women . did I used to,, when I first met him. Did I tell him, that person, makes me sick, her too, her too, did you see what she did, who did you take?, I think someone was in the bed.- I saw a name on a piece of paper,- you spent more time with her than me, ! I'm sorry you take offense at the word cunt. is it the word or the behavior to which it refers that is
 upsetting.  What is the one thing about you that I do like.. you are the only person in the world that I trust.  -- regarding the chin hair, it's not the same with out the drop of milk , that used to hand from it  
 ,


      ____________________________________________________________________________________
Be a better friend, newshound, and 
know-it-all with Yahoo! Mobile.  Try it now.  http://mobile.yahoo.com/;_ylt=Ahu06i62sR8HDtDypao8Wcj9tAcJ
